title: Custom Classic Music
description: Replaces the default disk music with some of my favorites
body:
5- Bad Moon Rising- Creedence Clearwater Revival

11- Since You've Been Gone- Rainbow

13- The Adults Are Talking- The Strokes

blocks- Here Comes The Sun- The Beatles

cat- Badlands- Bruce Springsteen

chirp-  You Give Love A Bad Name- Bon Jovi

far- Bad- Michael Jackson

mall- Folsom Prison Blues- Johnny Cash

mellohi- Everybody Needs Somebody To Love- Blues Brothers

otherside- All By Myself- Eric Carmen

pigstep-Starman- David Bowie

relic- Everybody Wants To Rule The World- Tears For Fears

stal-Walk This Way- Aerosmith

strad- Sweet Emotion- Aerosmith

wait- I Don't Want to Miss A Thing- Aerosmith

ward- Dream On-Aerosmith

Please donate to MusiCares

About Charity: MusiCares provides a safety net of critical health and welfare services to the music community in three key areas:

Mental Health & Addiction Recovery Services: Support, referrals, and emergency financial assistance for counseling, psychiatric care, inpatient treatment, coaching, intensive outpatient care, sober living and more.

Health Services: Financial assistance during medical crises and preventive services such as dental and medical screenings, hearing clinics, and vocal health workshops.

Human Services: Support for basic living expenses like rent, utilities, car payments and insurance premiums in times of hardship, plus programs addressing affordable housing, career development, legal issues and senior services.

https://musicares.org/about

All songs are property of their creators.

only works in  1.20.1. I honestly really didn't know what all this meant when I first started this.
